===== unescape =====
Decodes String objects encoded with the escape method.

  unescape(charString)

**Remarks**

The required charString argument is a String object or literal to be decoded.

The **unescape** method returns a string value that contains the contents of charstring. All characters encoded with the %37xx hexadecimal form are replaced by their ASCII character set equivalents.

Characters encoded in %37uxxxx format (Unicode characters) are replaced with the Unicode character with hexadecimal encoding xxxx.
